response: The captain of the only battleship to provide gunfire support during the Vietnam War was Rear Adm. J. Edward Snyder, USN (Ret.). He commanded the USS "New Jersey" (BB-62), which was the only US battleship to provide gunfire support during the Vietnam War. Snyder was known for his relaxed shipboard policies and ability to motivate his crew, which earned him the respect of those aboard the ship.
